body.text: The Genesis Whitepaper v1.1 details the applied implementation of the Tetrahedron Protocol across six deployed systems, demonstrating practical validation of the theoretical framework.
Building upon the mathematical foundations established in Paper I, this whitepaper documents the real-world deployment of P31 Labs' cognitive infrastructure.
BONDING - Multiplayer chemistry game with 413 automated tests
K4 and T4 cage mesh infrastructure
Sub-$50 BOM target for Node Zero hardware
These implementations demonstrate the pattern: give a neurodivergent operator the right AI tools, and they out-ship conventional teams by an order of magnitude.
